english: As you sow, so shall you reap
meaning: Your actions determine your outcomes; good deeds bring good results and bad deeds bring consequences.

english: A bad workman blames his tools
meaning: People often blame external factors instead of accepting their own shortcomings.
It is better to complete something late than not do it at all.
Something too small to make any meaningful difference.

english: An insider can cause great damage
meaning: A person from within can be more harmful than an outsider.

hindi: सौ सुनार की, एक लोहार की
transliteration: Sau sunar ki, ek lohar ki
english: One strong blow is better than many weak ones
meaning: A single powerful action can be more effective than repeated small efforts.
Working together leads to success and strength.
Small efforts together create big results.

hindi: जाको राखे साइयां मार सके न कोय
transliteration: Jako rakhe saiyan maar sake na koy
english: God protects those who are under His care
explanation: Divine protection keeps a person safe from harm.

hindi: आम के आम गुठलियों के दाम
transliteration: Aam ke aam guthliyon ke daam
meaning: Getting multiple advantages from a single effort.

english: When in Rome, do as Romans do
meaning: Adapt to the customs of the place you are in.
People with little knowledge often talk the most.

hindi: दूध का जला छाछ भी फूँक-फूँक कर पीता है
transliteration: Doodh ka jala chhachh bhi phoonk-phoonk kar peeta hai
meaning: A bad experience makes a person more cautious in the future.

hindi: अब पछताए होत क्या जब चिड़िया चुग गई खेत
transliteration: Ab pachtaye hot kya jab chidiya chug gayi khet
english: No use crying over spilt milk
meaning: Regret is useless after the damage is done.
Taking too long to complete a small task.

english: In the land of the blind, the one-eyed man is king
meaning: A person with limited ability can appear superior among less capable people.
When resources are limited, many compete for the same thing.
People who lack substance often speak loudly.

hindi: मन के हारे हार है, मन के जीते जीत
transliteration: Man ke haare haar hai, man ke jeete jeet
english: Defeat and victory are in the mind
meaning: Your mindset determines success or failure.
Your actions directly influence your results.
